title: Junior Content & Social Media Executive
description:
We are seeking a creative and versatile Content Creator with a passion for health, skincare, and beauty. This role goes beyond traditional writing—you’ll be responsible for independently researching, fact-checking, and creating engaging, SEO-friendly content across multiple formats to inspire, educate, and connect with our audience across multiple brands.


Your responsibilities will include:

  • Research, fact-check, and write high-quality content on health, beauty, and wellness topics
  • Create content across multiple formats, including but not limited to:
  • -- Blog posts & long-form articles (educational, SEO-driven)
  • -- Website copy & product descriptions
  • -- Video scripts for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and interviews
  • -- Social media posts (captions, carousel copy, “myth vs fact” posts, Q&As, polls, engagement content)
  • -- Email newsletters (beauty tips, product launches, seasonal campaigns)
  • -- Educational infographics and visual content ideas for design teams
  • -- E-books / guides / how-to manuals for lead generation
  • -- Case studies & testimonials showcasing customer experiences
  • -- Press releases & PR content for launches and events
  • -- Ad copy for social ads, Google ads, and campaign creatives
  • -- Podcast scripts / show notes (if required)
  • Collaborate with marketing, creative, and product teams to align content with campaigns and brand voice
  • Stay updated on industry trends, skincare innovations, and beauty news
  • Ensure all content is optimized for SEO, accuracy, and brand consistency
  • Work with Operations teams to materialize contents

Requirements

  • Proven experience in content writing/creation, ideally within health, beauty, or wellness
  • Strong research and fact-checking skills; ability to simplify complex topics into engaging, easy-to-digest content
  • Excellent writing, editing, and proofreading abilities with attention to detail
  • Familiarity with SEO, content marketing, and social media best practices
  • Ability to adapt writing style across platforms (blogs, ads, video scripts, social media)
  • Communication skills and team work
  • Passion for skincare, wellness, and beauty


Join us and bring your creativity to life across articles, videos, campaigns, and more—helping us inspire our community in the world of beauty and wellness.


Workplace: Jln Kilang

Schedule: Mon-Fri, 9-6pm

Please note: The job title and salary range etc indicated are for reference purposes only. The final offer may differ based on experience, qualifications, and internal evaluation.

postedCompany.description:
Since 1997, HAACH has been a cornerstone of beauty and wellness in Singapore, redefining the boundaries of premium spa and skincare services. Celebrating our 27th anniversary in 2024, we are renowned for our commitment to excellence, consistently receiving "Best in Beauty" awards from prestigious publications such as Her World, Harper’s Bazaar, Elle, Women's Weekly, and Cleo. Our mission is to empower our clients to achieve their skincare goals by delivering exceptional and transformative experiences.


Philosophy:


At HAACH, we believe in achieving beauty through a harmonious balance of innovative science and refined relaxation techniques. Each treatment is tailored to optimize skin health, driven by proprietary protocols developed from decades of expertise. Our approach ensures that every visit not only rejuvenates the skin but also restores the spirit, making us the enduring choice for those seeking effective skincare solutions in a serene environment.


Mission:


Our mission is to blend cutting-edge scientific research with luxurious spa treatments to provide real results. We utilize the latest technologies and therapeutic techniques to create personalized experiences that address each client's unique skin concerns—from age-defying to pigmentation correction and acne treatments.
postedCompany.name: HAACH LIFESTYLE HMH PTE. LTD.
